name: use-debounce
description: Debounce a fast-changing value — returns a copy that only updates once a delay has passed without a new change. Perfect for search inputs so you fetch on the settled value, not every keystroke.

intents: debounce a value that changes too fast
wait until typing stops before searching or fetching
throttle a search input before calling the server
examples:
const debounced = useDebounce(query, 300);
const results = useAsync(() => api.search(debounced), [debounced]);
